landing.title: Welcome to LanShout
landing.subtitle: A simple, real-time shoutbox designed for LAN parties and events. Let everyone share messages, coordinate games, and stay connected during your event.
landing.heroTitle: Real-time chat for your LAN event.
landing.heroDescription: LanShout is a live chat platform for LAN parties. Coordinate with other attendees, get announcements from organizers, and stay connected throughout the event.
landing.poweredBy: Powered by LanShout — Part of the Lan-Software ecosystem

simpleMessaging.title: Simple Messaging
simpleMessaging.description: Post quick messages and updates that everyone at your LAN can see instantly.

realTimeUpdates.title: Real-Time Updates
realTimeUpdates.description: Messages appear instantly for all users with real-time synchronization.

builtForEvents.title: Built for Events
builtForEvents.description: Perfect for LAN parties, gaming events, and community gatherings.

liveChat.title: Live Chat
liveChat.description: Real-time messaging with all event attendees in one shared space.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Staff tools for content moderation and role-based permissions.

lanCoreSso.title: LanCore SSO
lanCoreSso.description: Sign in with your LanCore account. Roles and identity synced automatically.

cta.title: Ready to connect with your community?
cta.description: Log in to start chatting or create an account to join the conversation.

landing.footer: LanShout - Simple real-time messaging for your events

login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your information to create an account
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
verifyEmail.linkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

chat.title: Chat
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Be the first to say something!
chat.slowModeActive: Slow mode is active. You can send a message in {seconds} seconds.
chat.rateLimited: You are sending messages too quickly. Please wait.
chat.messageBlocked: Your message was blocked by content filters.

contentFiltering.title: Content Filtering
contentFiltering.blockedWordsHelp: Enter words to block, one per line
contentFiltering.allowUrlsHelp: When disabled, messages containing URLs will be filtered

spam.title: Spam Detection
spam.repeatThresholdHelp: Number of identical messages before flagging as spam
spam.windowSecondsHelp: Time window for counting repeated messages

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.messagesHelp: Maximum messages a user can send per window

slowMode.title: Slow Mode
slowMode.cooldownSecondsHelp: Minimum time between messages per user
slowMode.autoThresholdHelp: Messages per minute across all users to auto-trigger slow mode

profanityFilter.title: Profanity Filter
profanityFilter.description: Controls whether general profanity and explicit sexual language are blocked.
profanityFilter.enabledHelp: When disabled, general swearing and explicit terms are allowed through.
profanityFilter.safetyNotice: Safety word lists (child, animal, racial, and violence protections) are always applied and cannot be disabled.

muted.title: You are muted
muted.contact: Contact a moderator for more information

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.chatColorDescription: Choose a color for your username in chat messages
profile.resendLink: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

users.title: Users
users.name: Name
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.description: View and manage user accounts and roles

chatSettingsCard.description: Configure message filters, rate limits, and slow mode

deleteUser.title: Delete account
deleteUser.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteUser.warningText: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteUser.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteUser.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

settingsLayout.title: Settings
settingsLayout.description: Manage your profile and account settings

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters
